item.title: Photo Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photo Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Photo Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Utility from www.photo-engineering.com provides facility to regain accidentally deleted files from SD cards that lost due to human errors or improper shutdown of operating system during unexpected electricity cuts.File restore tool recovers erased multimedia files from corrupted pen drives at any time. Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

[read more]

Photo Recovery Utility

Photo Recovery Utility from www.photo-engineering.com provides facility to regain accidentally deleted files from SD cards that lost due to human errors or improper shutdown of operating system during unexpected electricity cuts.File restore tool recovers erased multimedia files from corrupted pen drives at any time. Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

[read more]

Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

item.title: Mobile Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Do you want to bring back your crucial data from formatted cell phone devices in simplified manner? Use highly reliable and cost effective Mobile Phone Data Recovery application that is designed specifically to retrieve songs, movies, images, picture, audios, videos, screensavers, wallpapers etc from your cell phone memory misplaced due to various data loss circumstances in quick time without affecting quality of files.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]

item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Perplexity AI App
(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

item.title: USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Digital photo reviving application is provided by site www.datarecoverybook.com for retrieving corrupted pictures and other valuable screenshots from thumb drive. USB Drive Data Recovery Software uses advanced technology for getting back spyware affected your favorite games from jump drive.Affordable file recouping tool is easy to use for reviving accidently deleted audios songs saved in various formats like mp3, wav etc from flash storage device. USB Drive Data Recovery Software is capable to restore logically affected wallpapers, projects and presentation slides from pen drive. Download image restoration tool from site www.datarecoverybook.com that recovers formatted office documents from key chain storage device.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Most powerful image restoration application has ability to recover entire lost, corrupted image files from major digital storage devices of any capacity. Reliable Digital Camera Data Recovery software allows user to retrieve virus infected photos from major brands of camera such as Point and Shoot camera, Digital Video camera, Novelty camera, Professional camera of different sizes and pixels and many more within shortest time duration.
